value.found_quote: The [`anthropics/claude-code`](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/tree/main/.devcontainer) repository includes an example dev container that combines the CLI, the egress firewall, persistent volumes, and a Zsh-based shell.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a reference container ("Try the reference container") that combines the CLI, egress firewall, persistent volumes, and a Zsh-based shell, directly matching all elements of the claim. It is described as a working/example container currently provided.
